dhp67:1: It’s not good, the doing of the deed

dhp69:1: As long as evil has yet to ripen,
dhp69:2: the fool mistakes it for honey.
dhp70:1: Month after month the fool might eat
dhp70:2: only a tip-of-grass measure of food,
dhp70:3: but he wouldn’t be worth one sixteenth
dhp70:4: of those who’ve fathomed the Dhamma.
